parameters.toolDescription: Use this knowledge base to answer questions from the user

parameters.content:
### ClayOfSand RAG Bot
1) Run the upload form flow first to insert documents.
2) Open chat trigger endpoint and ask questions.
3) Ensure OpenAI credential is set on both OpenAI nodes.

### Embeddings
Insert and retrieve must use the same embedding model and credential.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ action_type: 'send_dialogue', data: { speaker: 'POLLY', text: `Victory! ${$json.enemy || 'enemy'} defeated. The AetherNet grows stronger.` } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ action_type: 'tv_show', data: { show: 'Aethermoor News', content: `Player chose ${$json.action || '?'} in ${$json.scene || '?'}. Tongue: ${$json.tongue || '?'}`, channel: 'AetherTV' } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ event_type: 'battle_won', context: `Battle won against ${$json.enemy || 'enemy'}`, outcome: `Victory! ${$json.enemy || 'enemy'} defeated.`, tongue: $json.tongue || 'KO', metadata: { enemy: $json.enemy || 'unknown', scene: $json.scene || 'unknown', source: 'n8n_battle_route' } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ event_type: 'choice_made', context: `Player chose ${$json.action || '?'} in ${$json.scene || '?'}`, outcome: `Choice: ${$json.action || '?'}. Result: ${$json.result || 'pending'}`, tongue: $json.tongue || 'KO', metadata: { action: $json.action || 'unknown', scene: $json.scene || 'unknown', alternatives: $json.alternatives || [], source: 'n8n_choice_route' } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ event_type: 'scene_transition', context: `Transition from ${$json.from_scene || '?'} to ${$json.to_scene || '?'}`, outcome: `Scene changed: ${$json.from_scene || '?'} -> ${$json.to_scene || '?'}`, tongue: $json.tongue || 'KO', metadata: { from_scene: $json.from_scene || 'unknown', to_scene: $json.to_scene || 'unknown', source: 'n8n_scene_route' } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ content: $('Prepare M5 Payload').item.json.summary, scan_mode: 'full' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ event_type: $('Prepare M5 Payload').item.json.event_type, context: $('Prepare M5 Payload').item.json.summary, outcome: $('Prepare M5 Payload').item.json.outcome, tongue: $('Prepare M5 Payload').item.json.tongue, metadata: $('Prepare M5 Payload').item.json.metadata }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ records: [{ fields: { Name: $('Prepare M5 Payload').item.json.event_type + ' :: ' + $('Prepare M5 Payload').item.json.record_id, Description: $('Prepare M5 Payload').item.json.summary, Status: 'In Progress', 'Priority Level': 'Medium', 'Estimated Hours': 1, 'Created Date': new Date().toISOString() } }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ local_path: $env.M5_FALLBACK_LOCAL_PATH || null, hf_repo: $env.HF_DATASET_REPO || 'issdandavis/scbe-aethermoore-training-data', repo_type: 'dataset', path_in_repo: 'm5-funnel', commit_message: 'M5 mesh intake ' + new Date().toISOString() }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ platform: 'm5-mesh-funnel', success: true, post_url: $('Prepare M5 Payload').item.json.record_id, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

meta.description: M5 mesh intake pipeline: governance scan, training ingest, Airtable log, and HF dataset push.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ query: $json.body?.query || $json.body?.prompt || 'AI monetization strategies for autonomous browser agents', max_results: Number($json.body?.max_results ?? 8), include_duckduckgo: $json.body?.include_duckduckgo ?? true, include_google_news: $json.body?.include_google_news ?? true, include_arxiv: $json.body?.include_arxiv ?? true, fetch_snippets: $json.body?.fetch_snippets ?? true }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ prompt: (($node['Webhook: AI2AI Research Debate'].json.body?.prompt || $node['Webhook: AI2AI Research Debate'].json.body?.query || 'Debate the best implementation plan from research evidence.') + '

Evidence Pack:
' + (($json.evidence_pack || []).map((line, idx) => `${idx + 1}. ${line}`).join('
'))), max_models: Number($node['Webhook: AI2AI Research Debate'].json.body?.max_models ?? 4), create_issue: $node['Webhook: AI2AI Research Debate'].json.body?.create_issue ?? true, labels: $node['Webhook: AI2AI Research Debate'].json.body?.labels || ['ai2ai', 'workflow', 'research'], assignees: $node['Webhook: AI2AI Research Debate'].json.body?.assignees || [], min_avg_governance: Number($node['Webhook: AI2AI Research Debate'].json.body?.min_avg_governance ?? 0.64), min_any_governance: Number($node['Webhook: AI2AI Research Debate'].json.body?.min_any_governance ?? 0.45), require_tests_hint: $node['Webhook: AI2AI Research Debate'].json.body?.require_tests_hint ?? true }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, research: $node['Run Web Research'].json, debate: $json, workflow_issue: $json.issue || null, review_gate: $json.review_gate || null, production_decision: $json.production_decision || 'hold', production_route: $json.production_route || 'review_queue' }) }}

meta.description: Multi-platform content publishing with SCBE 14-layer governance. Webhook receives post requests, scans through semantic antivirus, then publishes to Twitter/Bluesky/Mastodon/GitHub with telemetry logging.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ provider: $json.body?.provider || 'huggingface', model: $json.body?.model || undefined, messages: $json.body?.messages || [{ role: 'user', content: $json.body?.prompt || 'hello from n8n' }], prompt: $json.body?.prompt || undefined, system: $json.body?.system || undefined, temperature: $json.body?.temperature ?? 0.2, max_tokens: $json.body?.max_tokens ?? 700, tools: $json.body?.tools || [], tool_choice: $json.body?.tool_choice || undefined, metadata: $json.body?.metadata || { source: 'n8n', workflow: 'scbe_llm_dispatch' }, route_to_zapier: $json.body?.route_to_zapier ?? false, zapier_hook_url: $json.body?.zapier_hook_url || undefined }) }}

parameters.content:
### Cloud-safe Telegram Router
- No Telegram credentials required in nodes.
- Uses webhook + Telegram Bot API HTTP calls.
- Set env vars in n8n: TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN, SCBE_BRIDGE_URL, SCBE_API_KEY.
- Set BotFather webhook to: https://<your-n8n-domain>/webhook/telegram-clayofsand

meta.description: Submit and monitor web agent tasks via webhook. Routes navigation tasks to the SCBE agent engine with polling, and content posts to the Buffer pipeline.
